docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,442.59 FILED BY CALIGAGAN, ARNOLD AS TO DEFENDANT DELUMEN, JOHANSSEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED MAR-04-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELUMEN, JOHANSSEN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CALIGAGAN, ARNOLD DELUMEN, JOHANSSEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-02-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT DELUMEN WILL PAY PLAINTIFF CALIGAGNAN $1,800.11 BY MAY 15, 2017. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANA PEEBLES; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIGAGAN, ARNOLD AS TO DEFENDANT DELUMEN, JOHANSSEN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE; CASE SETTLED. PER THE MAY-05-17 ORDER THE DEFENDANT AGREED TO PAY THE PLAINTIFF $1800.11 BY MAY-15-17. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD CALIGAGAN. DEFENDANT JOHANSSEN DELUMEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
